content: Sebastian Gaunt: Chill Winston, you see all these trash cans and remnants of human society scattered around? Can't you feel the weight of history on our backs, son? We're now the outcasts in a world where no one wants us anymore. But guess what? We're the only ones who can show them what it truly means to be alive. And I mean that in the most filthy, rail-spitting way possible. You down with that? Chill Winston: Hell yeah, boss. I'm down for a good ol' raunchy romp through the ruins any day of the week. What's on the menu today, Gaunt? You got something in mind? Sebastian Gaunt: I've got my eye on a couple of Supermutant broads over there. They're serving up some prime slag over at the remains of the British Museum. Think you can handle yourself against some rock-hard hussies, Chill?

Chill Winston: Oh hell yes, Gaunt! I'm more than ready to show thoseSupermutant sluts who's the king of the ruins. Let's get it on! Sebastian Gaunt: That's the spirit, boy. Let's go make history... the dirty, filthy kind. Keep your wits about you and watch my back, alright? You don't want to end up a husky snack for those rock-hard hussies now, do you? Chill Winston: No chance of that, Gaunt. I'll be by your side every step of the way, crushing anything that dares to get in our path. Bring on the Supermutant slags! Let's give them a show they'll never forget! Sebastian Gaunt: That's what I'm talking about, Chill. Let's give these ruins a reason to remember us... let's paint this city red with passion and lust!

Sebastian Gaunt: Chill, keen to get started? I heard there's a group of Supermutant women in the British Museum we could raid. Chill Winston: Yeah, Sebastian, I've been ready for that all day. Quite a few of the Supermutant babes in there, and they're gonna be all kinds of helpless once we get in there. I'm hardware all day long for that gig. Sebastian Gaunt: I can't wait either. There's something about Supermutant women that just turns me on, you know? Their strength, their obedience... They're perfect for what we've got planned. Chill Winston: You're speaking my language, Sebastian. I've been looking for a chance to get my hands on some Supermutant flesh for a long time now. And in little more than an hour, we'll be making that a reality. Sebastian Gaunt: It's about time we had a little fun, Chill.

Chill Winston: Alright, let's move out then, Sebastian. Time to put these Supermutant girls in their place. Sebastian Gaunt: Agreed. Let's head to the British Museum and show them who's boss. Chill Winston: Definitely. This is gonna be one for the history books.

Sebastian Gaunt: You know, Winston, this city is like a festering wound, ripe for exploitation. I can almost taste the freedom in the ruins. Chill Winston: Yeah, Gaunt, and with the Vagabonds leading the charge, we're gonna make sure everyone feels the burn, especially those pretentious Gentry fucks up in Westminster. They've had their fun for too long.

Sebastian Gaunt: Well, Winston, it seems we've got some unfinished business. Let's finish this chat and get down to what matters. Chill Winston: Agreed, Gaunt. Best not to keep the city waiting for what's coming next. Let's make sure they remember.
